creator: Aisha Malik
title: (No AI) Google rolls out new Gemini capabilities to Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Drive
dc:creator: Aisha Malik
content: The idea behind the new features is to make the apps more personal and capable to help users get things done faster, right within the platforms themselves.
contentSnippet: The idea behind the new features is to make the apps more personal and capable to help users get things done faster, right within the platforms themselves.

title: (No AI) Google’s Gemini AI is getting a bigger role across Docs, Sheets, and Slides
author: Emma Roth
content:
![The Gemini logo on a background of illustrated AI sparkles.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/02/STK255_Google_Gemini_B.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Google is [embedding its Gemini AI assistant](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-workspace-updates-march-2026) even more deeply within its Workspace apps. The changes, [which are rolling out to Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/reimagining-content-creation?e=reset) and AI plan subscribers, include a new Gemini chat window inside Google Docs, a way to generate entire spreadsheets with AI, and a new Gemini-powered search feature in Drive.

While Google Docs already shows you a few AI writing options alongside your blinking cursor, now you'll see a Gemini chat window at the bottom of your screen. There, you'll get the option to describe to Gemini the kind of document you'd like to create, and the AI assistant will use information from the web, Drive, Gmail, and Cha …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/890996/google-workspace-gemini-ai-docs-sheets-drive)

While Google Docs already shows you a few AI writing options alongside your blinking cursor, now you'll see a Gemini chat window at the bottom of your screen. There, you'll get the option to describe to Gemini the kind of document you'd like to create, and the AI assistant will use information from the web, Drive, Gmail, and Cha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) You can now ask Photoshop’s AI assistant to edit images for you
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![A screenshot showing the beta AI Assistant in Adobe Photoshop for web.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/Photoshop-for-web-AI-assistant.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

You can ask Adobe’s AI assistant to edit images in Photoshop for web by describing conversationally how you want it to change. | Image: Adobe

Adobe announced more agentic AI features for its Creative Cloud apps this week, allowing users to edit images and documents by describing the changes to a chatbot. A native AI-assistant is now available in public beta for Photoshop on web and mobile, and some Adobe apps, including Acrobat and Express, will soon be available to access directly within Microsoft's Copilot service.

The AI Assistant in Photoshop for web and mobile was introduced in [a private beta in October](https://www.theverge.com/news/807811/adobe-photoshop-lightroom-premiere-pro-ai-max-2025), but now more people can use it to remove distractions, change backgrounds, refine lighting, adjust color, and more. This follows Adobe launching [similar AI assistants for Ex …](https://www.theverge.com/news/807802/adobe-express-ai-assistant-prompt-editing-beta-max-2025)

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/891998/adobe-photoshop-web-mobile-ai-assistant-beta-launch)

A native AI-assistant is now available in public beta for Photoshop on web and mobile, and some Adobe apps, including Acrobat and Express, will soon be available to access directly within Microsoft's Copilot service.
The AI Assistant in Photoshop for web and mobile was introduced in a private beta in October, but now more people can use it to remove distractions, change backgrounds, refine lighting, adjust color, and more. This follows Adobe launching similar AI assistants for Ex …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
content: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
contentSnippet: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.

title: (No AI) How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale

creator: Maxwell Zeff
title: (No AI) Yann LeCun Raises $1 Billion to Build AI That Understands the Physical World
dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff
content: Meta’s former chief AI scientist has long argued that human-level AI will come from mastering the physical world, not language. His new startup, AMI, aims to prove it.
contentSnippet: Meta’s former chief AI scientist has long argued that human-level AI will come from mastering the physical world, not language. His new startup, AMI, aims to prove it.

title: (No AI) Nvidia Is Planning to Launch an Open-Source AI Agent Platform
